languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

languages.text: "Младший лексмеханик Карр-Айн, оператор вспомогательного терминала 289-0 нижних цехов Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17. Прагматик и бюрократ, видевший мир исключительно сквозь призму статистики, бесконечные парады расхода и прихода — его мало что интересовало, кроме учета клапанов и вентилей. Но, между делом, он ронял подобные жемчужины мудрости, сам того не замечая. Я же считал своим долгом их подбирать".

"Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

languages.text: 「アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17の地下工房の補助端末289-0のオペレーター、レクメカニスト・カー・エイン。統計のレンズを通してしか世界を見ない実用主義者で官僚。絶え間ない出入りを記録する以外に、何にも興味がない。しかし、時折、彼は気づかぬうちに、こんな知恵の珠を口にする。それを拾うのは私の義務だと感じた」
languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

languages.text: "Junior Lexmechanicus Carr-Ain, Operator von Hilfsterminal 289-0 in den unteren Werkstätten von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Ein Pragmatiker und Bürokrat, der die Welt ausschließlich durch das Prisma von Statistiken, endlosen Paraden von Ab- und Zuflüssen, betrachtete ... und neben der Überwachung von Ventilen und Rohren nur wenige Interessen hatte. Ab und an ließ er allerdings Perlen der Weisheit fallen, ohne es selbst zu bemerken. Ich hielt es für meine Pflicht, sie einzusammeln."
languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

traits.locale_text: "Junior Lexmechanicus Carr-Ain, Operator von Hilfsterminal 289-0 in den unteren Werkstätten von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Ein Pragmatiker und Bürokrat, der die Welt ausschließlich durch das Prisma von Statistiken, endlosen Paraden von Ab- und Zuflüssen, betrachtete ... und neben der Überwachung von Ventilen und Rohren nur wenige Interessen hatte. Ab und an ließ er allerdings Perlen der Weisheit fallen, ohne es selbst zu bemerken. Ich hielt es für meine Pflicht, sie einzusammeln."

languages.text: «El lexmecánico de segunda Carr-Ain, operario de la terminal auxiliar 289-0 en los talleres inferiores de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. Un burócrata pragmático que veía el mundo de un modo exclusivamente estadístico, como un desfile interminable de afluencias y emisiones; lo único que ocupaba su mente era la regulación de válvulas y conductos de ventilación. Pero de vez en cuando soltaba alguna perla de sabiduría como esta, sin ni siquiera darse cuenta de lo que había dicho. Supuse que era mi deber dejar constancia de ellas».
languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. Pero de vez en cuando soltaba alguna perla de sabiduría como esta, sin ni siquiera darse cuenta de lo que había dicho. Supuse que era mi deber dejar constancia de ellas».

languages.text: "Ast Lexmekanik Carr-Ain, Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin alt atölyelerindeki 289-0 numaralı yardımcı terminalin operatörü. Dünyayı yalnızca istatistiklerin prizmasından, bitmek bilmeyen çıktı ve girdi geçitleri üzerinden gören bir pragmatist ve bürokrattı. Vanaları ve havalandırmaları takip etmekten başka hiçbir şeye ilgisi yoktu. Fakat arada sırada kendisi bile fark etmeden bunun gibi bilgelik incileri dökerdi. Onları toplamanın vazifem olduğunu hissettim."
languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

Vanaları ve havalandırmaları takip etmekten başka hiçbir şeye ilgisi yoktu. Fakat arada sırada kendisi bile fark etmeden bunun gibi bilgelik incileri dökerdi. Onları toplamanın vazifem olduğunu hissettim."

languages.text: « Carr-Ain, opérateur du terminal auxiliaire 289-0 des ateliers inférieurs d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, un lexmécanicien junior pragmatique et bureaucrate qui voyait le monde uniquement à travers le prisme des statistiques et des flux entrants et sortants. Il ne s'intéressait à rien d'autre qu'aux valves et aux évents, mais, de temps à autre, il produisait des perles de sagesse comme celle-ci sans même s'en rendre compte. Il était de mon devoir de les recueillir. »
languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

traits.locale_text: « Carr-Ain, opérateur du terminal auxiliaire 289-0 des ateliers inférieurs d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, un lexmécanicien junior pragmatique et bureaucrate qui voyait le monde uniquement à travers le prisme des statistiques et des flux entrants et sortants. Il ne s'intéressait à rien d'autre qu'aux valves et aux évents, mais, de temps à autre, il produisait des perles de sagesse comme celle-ci sans même s'en rendre compte. Il était de mon devoir de les recueillir. »

languages.text: “初级思律机僧卡尔-艾因，卡利西斯祭坛17号下层车间辅助终端289-0的操作员。一个实用主义者兼官僚，他仅透过统计数据的棱镜观察世界，满眼尽是阀门与通风口那川流不息的进出队列——除却将其记录在册，他对其他事物鲜有兴趣。但偶尔，他会不经意间抛出此类智慧之珠，连他自己都未曾察觉。我认为拾起它们是我的职责。”
languages.original_text: "Junior Lexmechanic Carr-Ain, operator of auxiliary terminal 289-0 of the lower workshops of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17. A pragmatist and a bureaucrat who saw the world solely through the prism of statistics, endless parades of outflows and inflows — he had little interest in anything other than keeping track of valves and vents. But, now and then, he would drop pearls of wisdom such as these without even noticing it himself. I felt it was my duty to pick them up."

traits.locale_text: “初级思律机僧卡尔-艾因，卡利西斯祭坛17号下层车间辅助终端289-0的操作员。一个实用主义者兼官僚，他仅透过统计数据的棱镜观察世界，满眼尽是阀门与通风口那川流不息的进出队列——除却将其记录在册，他对其他事物鲜有兴趣。但偶尔，他会不经意间抛出此类智慧之珠，连他自己都未曾察觉。我认为拾起它们是我的职责。”
